title: Building long-running AI agents with ADK
summary: Google Cloud Tech presents a tutorial on building long-running AI agents using the open source Agent Development Kit (ADK). The tutorial demonstrates how a coordinator agent uses multi-agent delegation to distribute specialized tasks to sub-agents while maintaining clean reasoning chains in stateless, event-driven systems.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial covers building long-running AI agents with the open source Agent Development Kit (ADK), centering on the coordinator pattern. It demonstrates how a coordinator agent uses multi-agent delegation to distribute specialized tasks to sub-agents while preserving clean reasoning chains. The key technical point is doing this within stateless, event-driven systems, which matters for agents that persist across extended workflows rather than single exchanges.
